labs.name: Miller Lab
labs.pi_title: Irénée du Pont Professor of Chemistry

labs.name: Spiegel Lab
labs.openings_notes: Taking Yale College students with intro chem background. Term and summer positions.

student_notes.text: Best to email after reading the lab's most recent paper and mention a specific experiment that interested you.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Analytical Lab
labs.openings_notes: Summer openings for careful bench workers. Term spots rare.

labs.name: Newhouse Lab
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting ambitious undergrads with strong orgo background for multi-step total synthesis projects.

labs.name: Bhatt Lab
labs.openings_notes: Open to Yale College students. No mass spec experience required. Read two recent papers before outreach.

student_notes.text: Reading two recent papers before reaching out makes a real difference. Mention which experiment you found most interesting.

labs.name: Schatz Lab
labs.openings_notes: Summer only. Strong preference for students with prior molecular biology lab experience.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Biophysics Lab
labs.openings_notes: Open to students with physics or chem background who want to study molecules one at a time.

labs.name: Bhatt MCDB Lab
labs.openings_notes: Actively recruiting motivated undergrads for wet lab projects in stem cell biology.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Neural Development Lab
labs.openings_notes: Summer positions available for first and second year students.

labs.name: Bhatt Cell Death Lab
labs.openings_notes: Looking for motivated students interested in why and how cells die. No prior lab experience required.

labs.name: Schmitz Ecology Lab
labs.pi_title: Oastler Professor of Population and Community Ecology
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting field assistants each spring and summer.

labs.name: Donoghue Evolution Lab
labs.pi_title: Sterling Professor of Ecology and Evolutionary Biology

labs.name: Jetz Macroecology Lab
labs.pi_title: Professor of Ecology and Evolutionary Biology
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting students with strong quantitative skills for biodiversity and remote sensing projects.

labs.name: Bhatt Biophysics Lab
labs.openings_notes: Welcomes physics or engineering students interested in applying physical tools to biology.

labs.name: Zhao Biostatistics Lab
labs.pi_title: Ira V. Hiscock Professor of Biostatistics
labs.openings_notes: Open to students with strong stats foundation. Projects involve real genomic datasets.

labs.name: Weinberger Epidemiology Lab
labs.openings_notes: Good fit for students with stats or R background interested in population health.

labs.name: Bhatt Global Health Lab
labs.openings_notes: Welcoming students for computational global health projects. Python experience helpful but not required.

labs.name: Schulz Environmental Epidemiology Lab
labs.pi_title: Assistant Professor of Environmental Health Sciences
labs.openings_notes: Summer fellowship slots. Competitive but welcoming to motivated students.

labs.name: Lopez Oncology Lab
labs.openings_notes: Wet lab and computational spots. Mention disease area and data interest.

student_notes.text: Best to mention both your biology interest and comfort with data. Postdoc is the main contact.

labs.name: Bhatt Immunotherapy Lab
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting Yale undergrads for T cell and tumor model projects. Intro biology is sufficient background.

student_notes.text: Lab is very welcoming to first-year students. Reach out early in the fall — spots fill fast.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Microbiology Lab
labs.openings_notes: Summer positions for students interested in infectious disease and bacteria.

labs.name: Singh Neuroscience Lab
labs.openings_notes: Early emails work best when paired with a concrete question about the research.

student_notes.text: Email early in the term and include a specific question about their work. Senior grad mentor is very responsive.

labs.name: Bhatt Circuits Lab
labs.openings_notes: Looking for students with programming background to help with imaging data analysis pipelines.

labs.name: Bhatt Leukemia Lab
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting students for hematopoiesis and leukemia projects. Wet lab and bioinformatics options.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Cardiovascular Lab
labs.openings_notes: Open to motivated students. Will train in mouse models and tissue analysis.

labs.name: Biomedical Imaging Lab
labs.school: Yale School of Engineering and Applied Science
labs.openings_notes: Looking for students comfortable in Python who want to work on medical imaging pipelines.

labs.name: Translational Biosensors Lab
labs.school: Yale School of Engineering and Applied Science
labs.openings_notes: Summer openings each year. Term spots open occasionally.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Neural Engineering Lab
labs.school: Yale School of Engineering and Applied Science
labs.openings_notes: Strong interest in engineering undergrads with Python/MATLAB skills and curiosity about brain interfaces.

student_notes.text: Mention your programming background upfront. The lab values students who can hit the ground running with data analysis.

labs.name: Krishnaswamy Computational Biology Lab
labs.pi_title: Associate Professor of Computer Science and Genetics
labs.school: Yale School of Engineering and Applied Science
labs.openings_notes: One of the most active computational biology labs at Yale for undergrads. Python and ML background important.

student_notes.text: Highly active lab for undergrads. Apply with a GitHub link showing your Python projects. They respond to strong portfolios.

labs.name: Bhatt NLP Lab
labs.pi_title: A. Bartlett Giamatti Professor of Computer Science
labs.school: Yale School of Engineering and Applied Science

labs.name: Bhattacharya AI in Medicine Lab
labs.school: Yale School of Engineering and Applied Science
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting students with ML interest who are curious about healthcare applications.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Health Economics Lab
labs.openings_notes: Summer RA positions. Strong econometrics background expected.

labs.name: Bhatt Atmospheric Chemistry Lab
labs.pi_title: Associate Professor of Earth and Planetary Sciences
labs.openings_notes: Welcoming chemistry or physics students interested in the environment and atmosphere.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Geobiology Lab
labs.pi_title: Associate Professor of Earth and Planetary Sciences
labs.openings_notes: Seeking curious students to work on fossil records and ocean chemistry datasets. No background required.

labs.name: Bhatt Cognitive Neuroscience Lab
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting RAs for behavioral and neuroimaging studies. Great for pre-med or psych students.

student_notes.text: Really welcoming to beginners — you mostly run participants in studies and learn analysis over time. Great first lab experience.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Social Psychology Lab
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting RAs for online and in-person studies on decision making and social cognition.

labs.name: Human Nature Lab
labs.pi_title: Sterling Professor of Social and Natural Science
skills_preferred: curiosity about social science or biology
labs.openings_notes: Welcoming RAs for field and computational projects. Very interdisciplinary — bio, social science, CS all welcome.

student_notes.text: Very welcoming to undergrads across disciplines. Mention your specific interest — networks, health, or behavior — in your email.

labs.name: Bhatt Genetics Lab
labs.openings_notes: Recruiting undergrads for human genetics and genomics projects. Computational focus.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Functional Genomics Lab
labs.openings_notes: Open to motivated students for both wet lab and computational genomics work.

labs.name: Bhatt Pharmacology Lab
labs.openings_notes: Strong bench skills lab. Teaching environment, good for students who want to master wet lab technique.

student_notes.text: Very teaching-focused lab. Great for building core bench skills before joining a more specialized lab later.

labs.name: Bhattacharya Cell Biology Lab
labs.pi_title: Associate Professor of Cell Biology, YSM
labs.openings_notes: Summer positions only. Applications accepted starting March each year.

labs.name: Gerstein Bioinformatics Lab
labs.pi_title: Albert L. Williams Professor of Biomedical Informatics
labs.openings_notes: Large, active lab. Excellent for students wanting exposure to large genomics datasets and bioinformatics.

student_notes.text: Large, welcoming lab with lots of ongoing projects. Say what kind of data or analysis you want to work on. Python is essential.

labs.name: Bhatt Systems Biology Lab
labs.openings_notes: Looking for students with computational background to work on single-cell and network projects.
